message:
chore: minor clippy and cleanup fixes in extensions_js and session_conformance tests

- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to pijs_custom_ui_width_updates_trigger_reflow
  test to suppress lint warning on legitimately long test function
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on custom_id in save_round_trips_custom_entry
  test (value is moved, not used after)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
